mapper.sql: convert(cast(AES_DECRYPT_ECB(c.`id_card`, 'SecuR24LeCzCoRe') as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci

where t.`delete_flag` = b'0' and c.`delete_flag` = b'0' and t.`staff_id` = #{staffId}
and c.`name` like concat('%', #{request.patientName}, '%')
and like concat('%', #{request.idCard}, '%')
and ( ifnull(c.`phone`, '') like concat('%', #{request.mobile}, '%') or ifnull(c.`use_phone`, '') like concat('%', #{request.mobile}, '%') or ifnull(c.`register_phone`, '') like concat('%', #{request.mobile}, '%') )

where 1 = 1
and (p.`ID` = #{request.orderCode} or p.`ORDERID` = #{request.orderCode})
and p.`XM` like concat('%', #{request.patientName}, '%')
and p.`SFZH` like concat('%', #{request.idCard}, '%')
and p.`LXDH` like concat('%', #{request.mobile}, '%')
and ( p.`ID` like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`VIPID`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Medical_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Hosptial_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') or ifnull(p.`Clinic_No`, '') like concat('%', #{request.patientNo}, '%') )
and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) >= #{request.startTime}
and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) <= #{request.endTime}
and p.`YCXM` is not null

convert(cast(p.`ID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, convert(cast(p.`ORDERID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as orderCode, convert(cast(p.`XM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(p.`XB` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, convert(cast(p.`SFZH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, convert(cast(p.`LXDH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, convert(cast(coalesce(nullif(p.`VIPID`, ''), nullif(p.`Medical_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Hosptial_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Clinic_No`, ''), p.`ID`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, convert(cast(p.`ZHXMDM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageCode, convert(cast(x.`XMMC` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageName, convert(cast(coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as examTime, convert(cast(l.`JCJG` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalSummary, convert(cast(l.`ZJJL` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as finalConclusion
mapper.select:
select KSBM as departmentCode, KSMC as departmentName from ods_tj_ksbm where KSBM is not null and KSBM != ''
and KSBM in
#{code}
order by OrderCode asc, KSBM asc
select COLUMN_NAME from information_schema.COLUMNS where TABLE_SCHEMA = database() and TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} order by ORDINAL_POSITION asc
select count(1) from dw_customer_medical_team t inner join dw_customer_info c on c.`customer_master_id` = t.`customer_master_id`

select convert(cast(c.`customer_master_id` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as customerMasterId, convert(cast(c.`name` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(c.`sex` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, c.`age` as age, as idCard, convert(cast(coalesce(nullif(c.`phone`, ''), nullif(c.`use_phone`, ''), nullif(c.`register_phone`, '')) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as latestExamDate from dw_customer_medical_team t inner join dw_customer_info c on c.`customer_master_id` = t.`customer_master_id`
order by c.`updated_time` desc, c.`customer_master_id` desc limit #{request.offset}, #{request.size}

select patientNo, patientName, genderName, birthdayDate, age, idCard, resultType, sourceType, testNo, itemCode, itemName, reportItemCode, reportItemName, resultValue, printContext, unit, abnormalIndicator, requestedTime, reportTime, deviceType, deviceName, studyStatusName, reportAdvice, companyCode, companyName, uniqueId from ( select convert(cast(c.`MED_RECORD_CODE` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, convert(cast(c.`CUSTOMER_NAME` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(coalesce(l.`gender_name`, c.`GENDER_NAME`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as genderName, date_format(coalesce(l.`birthdaydate`, c.`BIRTHDAYDATE`), '%Y-%m-%d') as birthdayDate, l.`age` as age, convert(cast(c.`Certification_NUM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, cast('LIS' as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as resultType, convert(cast(l.`source_type` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as sourceType, convert(cast(l.`test_no` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as testNo, convert(cast(l.`item_name_code` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemCode, convert(cast(l.`item_name` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemName, convert(cast(l.`report_item_code` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportItemCode, convert(cast(l.`report_item_name` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportItemName, convert(cast(l.`result` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as resultValue, convert(cast(l.`print_context` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as printContext, convert(cast(l.`units` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as unit, convert(cast(l.`abnormal_indicator` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalIndicator, date_format(l.`requested_date_time`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as requestedTime, date_format(l.`results_rpt_date_time`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as reportTime, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as deviceType, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as deviceName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyStatusName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportAdvice, convert(cast(l.`company_id` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as companyCode, convert(cast(l.`company_name` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as companyName, convert(cast(l.`unique_id` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as uniqueId, date_format(coalesce(l.`results_rpt_date_time`, l.`requested_date_time`), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as sortTime from ods_his_zt_customer c inner join ods_his_zt_lisresult l on l.`patient_id` = c.`MED_RECORD_CODE` where c.`Certification_NUM` = #{idCard} and coalesce(l.`results_rpt_date_time`, l.`requested_date_time`) >= #{reportStartTime} and l.source_type = 'é—¨čŻŠ'
union all
select convert(cast(c.`MED_RECORD_CODE` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, convert(cast(c.`CUSTOMER_NAME` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(c.`GENDER_NAME` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as genderName, date_format(c.`BIRTHDAYDATE`, '%Y-%m-%d') as birthdayDate, timestampdiff(year, c.`BIRTHDAYDATE`, curdate()) as age, convert(cast(c.`Certification_NUM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, cast('PACS' as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as resultType, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as sourceType, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as testNo, convert(cast(p.`itemcode` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemCode, convert(cast(p.`studyscription` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemName, convert(cast(p.`itemcode` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportItemCode, convert(cast(p.`studyscription` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportItemName, convert(cast(nullif(concat_ws('\n', nullif(p.`reportdescribe`, ''), nullif(p.`reportdiagnose`, '')), '') as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as resultValue, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as printContext, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as unit, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalIndicator, date_format(p.`studytime`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as requestedTime, date_format(p.`operatetime`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as reportTime, convert(cast(p.`devicetype` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as deviceType, convert(cast(p.`devicename` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as deviceName, convert(cast(p.`studystatusname` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyStatusName, convert(cast(p.`reportadvice` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as reportAdvice, convert(cast(p.`company_code` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as companyCode, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as companyName, convert(cast(p.`UniqueID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as uniqueId, date_format(coalesce(p.`operatetime`, p.`studytime`), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as sortTime from ods_his_zt_customer c inner join ods_his_zt_pacsresult p on p.`infeepatientid` = c.`MED_RECORD_CODE` where c.`Certification_NUM` = #{idCard} and coalesce(p.`operatetime`, p.`studytime`) >= #{reportStartTime} ) his_item_result order by sortTime desc, uniqueId desc

select count(distinct p.`SFZH`) from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` where p.`SFZH` is not null and p.`SFZH` != '' and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) >= #{startTime} and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) < #{endTime}

select convert(cast(p.`ID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, convert(cast(p.`XM` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, convert(cast(p.`XB` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, convert(cast(p.`SFZH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, convert(cast(p.`LXDH` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, convert(cast(coalesce(nullif(p.`VIPID`, ''), nullif(p.`Medical_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Hosptial_No`, ''), nullif(p.`Clinic_No`, ''), p.`ID`) as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID`
order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc limit 1
select count(1) from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID`

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`ID` = #{studyId} limit 1

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`ID` in
#{studyId}
order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc

select
from ods_tj_jcxx p left join ods_tj_jlb l on l.`StudyID` = p.`ID` left join ods_tj_xmzh x on x.`XMDM` = p.`ZHXMDM` where p.`SFZH` = #{idCard} and coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) >= #{startTime} order by coalesce(p.`JCRQ`, p.`JDRQ`, l.`JLRQ`, p.`UpDateTime`) desc, p.`ID` desc

select * from (
select convert(cast(t.`StudyID` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as studyId, cast(#{table.departmentCode} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as departmentCode, cast(#{table.departmentName} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as departmentName, cast(#{table.tableName} as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as sourceTable,
convert(cast(
${table.majorItemCodeExpr} s.`SFXMDM`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as majorItemCode,
convert(cast(s.`SFXMMC` as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as majorItemName,
convert(cast(${table.itemCodeExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as itemCode,
convert(cast(
${table.itemNameExpr} j.`XXMC`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemName,
convert(cast(
${table.itemNameEnExpr} j.`EXXMC`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as itemNameEn,
convert(cast(${table.resultValueExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as resultValue,
convert(cast(
${table.unitExpr} j.`Unit`
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as unit,
convert(cast(
${table.referenceRangeExpr} concat_ws(' ~ ', j.`MDefValueDown`, j.`MDefValueUp`)
as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as referenceRange,
convert(cast(${table.abnormalFlagExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as abnormalFlag,
convert(cast(${table.examTimeExpr} as char) using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci
as examTime,
cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as orderCode, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as gender, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as idCard, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as mobile, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as patientNo, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageCode, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as packageName, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as abnormalSummary, cast(null as char character set utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci as finalConclusion from ${table.tableName} t
left join ods_tj_jcmxx j on j.`XXDM` = ${table.itemCodeExpr}
left join ods_tj_jcmxx j on 1 = 0
left join ods_tj_sfxm s on s.`SFXMDM` = ${table.majorItemCodeExpr}
left join ods_tj_sfxm s on 1 = 0
where t.`StudyID` in
#{studyId}
) department_item_list order by studyId desc, departmentCode asc, majorItemCode asc, itemCode asc
